stars.description: AI agent toolkit: coding agent CLI, unified LLM API, TUI & web UI libraries, Slack bot, vLLM pods
stars.highlights: Pi is an AI agent toolkit offering a coding agent CLI, unified LLM API, TUI & web UI libraries, Slack bot, and vLLM pods. It provides a comprehensive set of tools for building and deploying AI agents with a focus on developer experience and flexibility.
stars.worthReading: With nearly 50k stars, Pi has gained significant traction, indicating strong community interest. Its all-in-one approach to agent tooling makes it a valuable resource for developers looking to integrate AI agents into their workflows.
stars.scoreReason: Score 7: Freshness is moderate (high star count but established, no recent major updates noted); relevance is high (agent toolkit, LLM API, vLLM); concreteness is high (working CLI, libraries, and integrations).

stars.highlights: Tattletale is a stealth LLM inference engine written in Nim, focusing on performance and efficiency. It aims to provide a lightweight alternative for running large language models with minimal overhead.
stars.worthReading: It's worth exploring for its novel approach to LLM inference using Nim, which could offer unique performance characteristics and a fresh perspective in a field dominated by Python and C++.
stars.scoreReason: Freshness is moderate (low stars but rising, early stage), relevance is high (LLM inference engine), concreteness is low (stealth, no detailed features yet).
